specimen_or_model: public tissue cohorts plus cell lines
contrast_or_endpoint: GSE151179 RAIR versus RAI-avid claimed in paper
frozen_boundary: Do not substitute the code-derived TERT program for the unrecoverable paper-reported RAIR module.

contrast_or_endpoint: 12 composite ATA RAIR versus 7 non-RAIR among RAI-treated patients
frozen_boundary: The composite RAIR label conflates uptake loss heterogeneity and progression despite uptake.

specimen_or_model: pretreatment tumor tissue sequencing plus RT-qPCR
contrast_or_endpoint: RAIR-DTC versus non-RAIR-DTC after at least two RAI courses
frozen_boundary: Online-first supplementary-source capture; retain as a candidate-marker study, not a validated signature.

measurement_construct: clinical RAI refractoriness perfectly confounded by nodal status
frozen_boundary: RAI status and LN status are deterministically corresponding and cannot be independently estimated.

contrast_or_endpoint: low versus high ex vivo iodine concentration
frozen_boundary: Ex vivo iodine content is not clinical lesion uptake or structural response.
Use TDS as a lineage benchmark; do not present the unfinished TDP as a clinical RAIR tool.
Single-gene tissue association, not an externally validated portable signature.

contrast_or_endpoint: RECIST_v1.1 exceptional responders versus nonresponders within metastatic disease
frozen_boundary: Provides clinical context for endpoint ontology, not external validation of this audit.
Cannot be projected as a tissue bulk-RNA signature.

contrast_or_endpoint: 38 progression versus 254 censored RAI-treated TCGA cases
frozen_boundary: Predicts PFS among RAI-treated patients; it does not isolate RAI treatment response or uptake.
The score also predicts progression without RAI and its components were not RAI-treatment specific.
Clinical and histologic imbalance may contribute to the association.

contrast_or_endpoint: 13 RAIR versus all other thyroid tumors
frozen_boundary: The comparator includes sensitive and undefined tumors, so it is not RAIR versus RAI-avid.
Dataset overlap with IGF2 analyses must be declared.
After purity filtering only two RAI-avid tumors remained; reported expression results mainly compare RAIR tumor with normal tissue.

contrast_or_endpoint: prognostic expression subsets within an all-RAIR trial cohort
frozen_boundary: Cannot test uptake loss or distinguish RAIR from RAI-sensitive disease.
Do not label the glucose or differentiation association as clinical RAIR specificity.
Small paired redifferentiation study, not a baseline diagnostic signature.

contrast_or_endpoint: propensity-matched high versus low NIS expression
frozen_boundary: NIS expression is not interchangeable with lesion uptake or treatment response.
Direct uptake construct but circulating specimen prevents tissue-score projection.
Pilot biofluid study; not a tissue transcriptomic tool.
Small targeted-panel study with site and sampling limitations.
